summary: Marketing Module implementation verified successfully. All 22 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI tests passed - Marketing Calendar page, New Post dialog, View switching (Month/Week/Day), Marketing Masters page with Categories/Platforms/Events tabs, Module context switcher all working correctly. Neo-Brutalism design with Outfit/Manrope fonts verified.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning in console)

seed_data_creation: Test data created during tests (posts, categories, events) - cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marketing Module fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoints: GET /api/marketing/calendar, GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/marketing/posts, PUT /api/marketing/posts/{id}/status, GET/POST/PUT/DELETE /api/marketing/categories, GET/PUT /api/marketing/platforms, GET/POST/DELETE /api/marketing/events. Frontend: MarketingCalendar.js at /marketing-calendar with Month/Week/Day views, MarketingMasters.js at /marketing-masters with Categories/Platforms/Events tabs. Marketing module available in context switcher for admin roles (CEO, Director, Admin, System Admin). Neo-Brutalism design with Outfit/Manrope fonts, shadow effects, and rounded corners.

Backend_API_Tests.GET_calendar_april_2026: PASSED - Returns posts_by_date, events, stats with April events (Earth Day, World Health Day, Ambedkar Jayanti)
Backend_API_Tests.GET_calendar_january_2026: PASSED - Returns January events (New Year, Republic Day)
Backend_API_Tests.POST_posts: PASSED - Creates post with all fields, verified persistence
Backend_API_Tests.GET_categories: PASSED - Returns categories, seeds defaults (Health, Water, Luxury, Sustainability, etc.)
Backend_API_Tests.GET_platforms: PASSED - Returns platforms, seeds defaults (LinkedIn, WhatsApp, YouTube, Instagram, Facebook)
Backend_API_Tests.full_post_workflow: PASSED - Create -> Update -> Status changes (draft->review->scheduled->published) -> Delete

Frontend_UI_Tests.Calendar_month_view: PASSED - Shows April 2026 calendar with auto-events
Frontend_UI_Tests.Post_form_dialog: PASSED - All fields present (date, category, content type, concept, message, platforms, status)
Frontend_UI_Tests.Post_creation: PASSED - Creates post, shows success toast, updates calendar
Frontend_UI_Tests.Categories_tab: PASSED - Shows default categories with colors, add/edit/delete forms
Frontend_UI_Tests.Platforms_tab: PASSED - Shows 5 platforms with toggle switches
Frontend_UI_Tests.Events_tab: PASSED - Shows custom event form and auto-events list
Frontend_UI_Tests.Module_switcher: PASSED - Marketing module available in dropdown, switches context correctly
Frontend_UI_Tests.Marketing_navigation: PASSED - Shows Content Calendar and Masters links in sidebar

Design_Verification.Neo_Brutalism_style: PASSED - Bold borders, shadow effects, rounded corners
Design_Verification.Fonts: PASSED - Outfit for headings, Manrope for body text
Design_Verification.Color_scheme: PASSED - Fresh marketing vibe with coral (#FF6B6B), yellow (#FDE74C), teal (#4EA8DE), green (#A8E6CF)
